summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of Kurry Leaf restaurant website - All new features working correctly. Tested: Mobile hero section (Instagram badge hidden), hamburger menu, Google Review Prompt (star rating, redirect flow for 4-5 stars, feedback form for 1-3 stars, localStorage storage, rate again), mobile responsiveness at 375px and 320px.
critical_code_review_comments: Google Review Prompt correctly implements star-based routing: 4-5 stars -> Google Review redirect, 1-3 stars -> private feedback form
Private feedback stored in localStorage key 'kurryleaf_private_feedback' with proper structure (id, rating, name, message, createdAt)
Instagram badge correctly hidden on mobile using 'hidden md:flex' Tailwind classes
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for automated testing
seed_data_creation: Test feedback created and stored in localStorage during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: This is a frontend-only React app for Kurry Leaf restaurant. Key tested features: (1) Mobile hero - Instagram badge hidden on mobile via 'hidden md:flex', (2) Hamburger menu with all nav links + Instagram + phone + WhatsApp button, (3) Google Review Prompt with star rating - 4-5 stars shows Google redirect button, 1-3 stars shows private feedback form, feedback stored in localStorage 'kurryleaf_private_feedback', rate again resets flow. All sections mobile responsive at 375px and 320px.

hero_section_mobile.instagram_badge_hidden_375px: PASS - Floating Instagram badge correctly hidden on mobile
hero_section_mobile.instagram_badge_hidden_320px: PASS - Floating Instagram badge correctly hidden on smallest mobile
hero_section_mobile.instagram_badge_visible_desktop: PASS - Instagram badge visible on desktop at bottom right
hero_section_mobile.hamburger_menu_visible: PASS - Hamburger menu button visible on mobile
hero_section_mobile.cta_buttons_375px: PASS - View Menu and Order on WhatsApp buttons properly displayed
hero_section_mobile.cta_buttons_320px: PASS - Buttons properly laid out on smallest mobile

hamburger_menu.opens_closes: PASS - Menu opens on tap, X button closes
hamburger_menu.nav_links: PASS - All 7 nav links visible (Home, About, Offers, Menu, Gallery, Reviews, Contact)
hamburger_menu.whatsapp_button: PASS - Order on WhatsApp button visible

google_review_prompt.section_visible: PASS - data-testid='google-review-prompt' renders between Reviews and Contact
google_review_prompt.star_rating: PASS - All 5 stars visible and clickable (data-testid review-star-1 to review-star-5)
google_review_prompt.high_rating_flow_4_stars: PASS - Clicking 4 stars shows redirect step with 'Leave a Google Review' button
google_review_prompt.high_rating_flow_5_stars: PASS - Clicking 5 stars shows redirect step
google_review_prompt.low_rating_flow_1_3_stars: PASS - Clicking 1-3 stars shows private feedback form
google_review_prompt.feedback_form_fields: PASS - Name input, message textarea, Cancel, Send Feedback buttons all present
google_review_prompt.feedback_submission: PASS - Submitting feedback shows thank you message
google_review_prompt.feedback_localStorage: PASS - Private feedback stored in localStorage key 'kurryleaf_private_feedback'
google_review_prompt.rate_again_button: PASS - Rate again button visible in done step and resets flow
google_review_prompt.mobile_375px: PASS - All 5 stars visible, form displays correctly
google_review_prompt.mobile_320px: PASS - All 5 stars visible, redirect step displays correctly

mobile_responsiveness_375px.contact_section: PASS - Map, contact info, form all display properly
mobile_responsiveness_375px.footer: PASS - Quick links, contact info properly stacked

mocked_apis_note: ALL ordering, reviews and feedback storage is MOCKED in frontend using React Context and localStorage. Google Review redirect opens real Google Review URL in new tab.
